dict.string: Apple Assistant uses the microphone so you can speak commands to your personal assistant.
Apple Assistant uses speech recognition to turn your spoken commands into local personal assistant actions.
Apple Assistant uses Calendar access to answer scheduling questions and create events you request.
Apple Assistant uses Calendar access to answer scheduling questions and create events you request.
Apple Assistant uses Reminders access to answer reminder questions and create reminders you request.
Apple Assistant uses Reminders access to answer reminder questions and create reminders you request.
